## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Flosum and GrowthX teams to discuss SEO strategy, content performance, and upcoming initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/Ud-zgxnbyHqsxu94h_MT9rRzJow6JdJe?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Google update rolling out over next 3 weeks may cause traffic fluctuations](https://fathom.video/share/Ud-zgxnbyHqsxu94h_MT9rRzJow6JdJe?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Flosum terminated ABM agency; new PPC agency onboarding soon](https://fathom.video/share/Ud-zgxnbyHqsxu94h_MT9rRzJow6JdJe?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [LLM traffic declining as users trust results more; emphasis on getting Flosum mentioned in LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/Ud-zgxnbyHqsxu94h_MT9rRzJow6JdJe?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
  - [Impressions growing since April, though clicks haven't caught up yet; overall trend looks healthy](https://fathom.video/share/Ud-zgxnbyHqsxu94h_MT9rRzJow6JdJe?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [Impressions growing since April, likely due to new content publishing](https://fathom.video/share/Ud-zgxnbyHqsxu94h_MT9rRzJow6JdJe?tab=summary&timestamp=834.0)
  - [Clicks haven't caught up yet, partly due to AI overviews pushing results down](https://fathom.video/share/Ud-zgxnbyHqsxu94h_MT9rRzJow6JdJe?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
  - [Overall trend looks healthy; directionally correct for start of content program](https://fathom.video/share/Ud-zgxnbyHqsxu94h_MT9rRzJow6JdJe?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Some older blog posts getting random traction](https://fathom.video/share/Ud-zgxnbyHqsxu94h_MT9rRzJow6JdJe?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)

### Backlink Strategy

  - [Jakub provided list of target pages for backlinks, focusing on blog content](https://fathom.video/share/Ud-zgxnbyHqsxu94h_MT9rRzJow6JdJe?tab=summary&timestamp=1071.0)
  - [Only 1 total link to Flosum blog currently found](https://fathom.video/share/Ud-zgxnbyHqsxu94h_MT9rRzJow6JdJe?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)
  - [Prioritizing commercial pages and those close to ranking/traffic improvements](https://fathom.video/share/Ud-zgxnbyHqsxu94h_MT9rRzJow6JdJe?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)
  - [Matt to review list and potentially add AgentForce AI blog post as high priority](https://fathom.video/share/Ud-zgxnbyHqsxu94h_MT9rRzJow6JdJe?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)

### Website Errors

  - [Jakub working through which errors can be handled internally vs. requiring dev support](https://fathom.video/share/Ud-zgxnbyHqsxu94h_MT9rRzJow6JdJe?tab=summary&timestamp=1377.0)
  - [Will send detailed list and timeline in next day or so](https://fathom.video/share/Ud-zgxnbyHqsxu94h_MT9rRzJow6JdJe?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)

### Content Refresh & New Opportunities

  - [Jessalynn provided list of content needing refresh due to declining performance](https://fathom.video/share/Ud-zgxnbyHqsxu94h_MT9rRzJow6JdJe?tab=summary&timestamp=1427.0)
  - [Identified gap where competitor ranks for topics Flosum has in knowledge base but not blog](https://fathom.video/share/Ud-zgxnbyHqsxu94h_MT9rRzJow6JdJe?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
  - [Opportunity to create blog counterparts for knowledge base articles on main domain](https://fathom.video/share/Ud-zgxnbyHqsxu94h_MT9rRzJow6JdJe?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

### Product & Marketing Insights

  - [Matt attending internal sales enablement training](https://fathom.video/share/Ud-zgxnbyHqsxu94h_MT9rRzJow6JdJe?tab=summary&timestamp=1646.0)
  - [Key differentiators: branching strategy, overwrite protection in DevOps process](https://fathom.video/share/Ud-zgxnbyHqsxu94h_MT9rRzJow6JdJe?tab=summary&timestamp=1714.0)
  - [Potential content topics: low-code developers, citizen developers in Salesforce ecosystem](https://fathom.video/share/Ud-zgxnbyHqsxu94h_MT9rRzJow6JdJe?tab=summary&timestamp=1879.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Matt to review backlink target list and content refresh/new opportunity recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/Ud-zgxnbyHqsxu94h_MT9rRzJow6JdJe?tab=summary&timestamp=1937.0)
  - [Jakub to send website error details and action plan](https://fathom.video/share/Ud-zgxnbyHqsxu94h_MT9rRzJow6JdJe?tab=summary&timestamp=1943.0)
  - [Team to explore creating blog posts for knowledge base topics](https://fathom.video/share/Ud-zgxnbyHqsxu94h_MT9rRzJow6JdJe?tab=summary&timestamp=1950.0)
  - [Matt to share relevant snippets/insights from sales enablement training for content ideation](https://fathom.video/share/Ud-zgxnbyHqsxu94h_MT9rRzJow6JdJe?tab=summary&timestamp=1869.0)
  - [Continue monitoring performance through Google update and PPC agency transition](https://fathom.video/share/Ud-zgxnbyHqsxu94h_MT9rRzJow6JdJe?tab=summary&timestamp=1950.0)
